title: A Conversation all about the Game Crafter with JT Smith
body:
In this interview, Daniel (@dungeondive) sits down with JT Smith from The Game Crafter for a wide-ranging conversation about independent publishing, game development, and the future of tabletop design. JT shares insights into how The Game Crafter empowers creators by eliminating the need for upfront investment or large print runs, allowing designers to rapidly prototype, iterate, and sell games directly through an integrated marketplace. The platform’s robust suite of design tools, extensive parts catalogue, and community features make it an ideal environment for small publishers and hobbyists to bring their ideas to life.

Daniel and JT also touch on trends in the tabletop industry, the challenges of discoverability, and how the rise of solo gaming continues to influence game development. From the flexibility of print-on-demand to the support of an active creator community, the discussion highlights how The Game Crafter helps level the playing field for independent designers looking to experiment, publish, and connect with players.

thegamecrafter.com

Welcome to The Game Crafter - The world leader in print on demand board games.
